name: brainstormer-codex
description: Read and organize one approved Brainstormer session in Codex through the Brainstormer MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Read, create notes, and organize one approved Brainstormer session.
interface.longDescription: Brainstormer Codex connects Codex to Brainstormer through a scoped OAuth MCP server. Codex can inspect the single approved session, create new notes/nodes, and use approved tools for tasks, Task Groups, Kanban boards, and custom timeline events without node editing, delete, sharing, cross-session, or account-wide access.
defaultPrompt: Turn the previous answer into separate Brainstormer nodes.
Help me create or update Brainstormer tasks.
